ksa_text: Skill in designing and delivering AI workforce training and capability development, including designing AI risk management training programs, assessing organizational AI literacy and technical knowledge, and building governance competencies.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain AI Governance KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.0) to justify inclusion for the AI Innovation Lead. Without stronger framework alignment, this skill KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain skill KSA be expected in real-world AI Innovation Lead roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm AI Governance is not a standard competency expectation for AI Innovation Lead. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the AI Innovation Lead competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.0) and edge-domain placement (AI Governance) do not meet inclusion threshold for the AI Innovation Lead. All passes support exclusion.
